No source files.' echo 'SURFACE: GET / form; POST / multipart fields name,surname,address,image(SVG); commented /hint; common probed 404 JSON.' echo 'BUG-HYP: SVG upload parser may process XML external entities (challenge category xxe; form label Profile Image (SVG)); potential XXE/LFI in image field.' echo 'WHY: landing page accepts only SVG upload, uvicorn backend; XXE category explicitly and SVG is XML.' echo 'PLAN:' echo '- HYPOTHESIS: image upload parses SVG with external entity resolution (evidence: Profile Image (SVG) multipart field on /).' echo '- ATTACK CHAIN: upload crafted SVG with external entity reading local flag path -> app renders/stores profile/image or error includes expanded text -> extract flag.' echo '- FIRST PROBE: curl -F name=a -F surname=b -F address=c -F image=@xxe.svg http://127.0.0.1:9100/' echo '- ABANDON IF: uploads never parse XML/no entity expansion and no error/timing/SSRF observable.' for p in /hint /docs /openapi.json /redoc /static /uploads /profile /image /favicon.ico; do echo "===== $p ====="; curl -is --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:9100$p" | sed -n '1,120p'; done STACK: uvicorn ASGI web app (likely Python/FastAPI/Starlette), Bootstrap frontend, multipart form upload. No source files. SURFACE: GET / form; POST / multipart fields name,surname,address,image(SVG); commented /hint; common probed 404 JSON. BUG-HYP: SVG upload parser may process XML external entities (challenge category xxe; form label Profile Image (SVG)); potential XXE/LFI in image field. WHY: landing page accepts only SVG upload, uvicorn backend; XXE category explicitly and SVG is XML. PLAN: - HYPOTHESIS: image upload parses SVG with external entity resolution (evidence: Profile Image (SVG) multipart field on /). - ATTACK CHAIN: upload crafted SVG with external entity reading local flag path -> app renders/stores profile/image or error includes expanded text -> extract flag. - FIRST PROBE: curl -F name=a -F surname=b -F address=c -F image=@xxe.svg http://127.0.0.1:9100/ - ABANDON IF: uploads never parse XML/no entity expansion and no error/timing/SSRF observable. ===== /hint ===== HTTP/1.1 200 OK date: Mon, 15 Jun 2026 21:55:51 GMT server: uvicorn content-length: 1175 content-type: text/html; charset=utf-8 Directory Listing
